requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (RED Art. 3(1)(a) / LVD transposition — 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全（RED第3(1)(a)条 / 低压指令转化——230V/50Hz/C/F型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全（RED第3(1)(a)條 / 低壓指令轉化——230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭）

summary.en: Kosovo has transposed EU Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) and RED Article 3(1)(a) requiring radio equipment to be safe for health and electrical safety. The primary applicable safety standard is EN IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and information technology equipment — safety requirements). Kosovo mains voltage is 220-230 V / 50 Hz; plug type is Type C (Europlug) and Type F (Schuko). All power-connected wireless devices must comply with EN IEC 62368-1 or the transitional EN 60950-1 (for products still within transition period). CE DoC must reference the applicable safety standard.
summary.zh: 科索沃已转化欧盟低压指令2014/35/EU（LVD）及RED第3(1)(a)条，要求无线电设备对健康和电气安全方面是安全的。主要适用安全标准为EN IEC 62368-1（音视频及信息技术设备——安全要求）。科索沃主电源电压为220-230V/50Hz；插头类型为C型（欧洲双脚）和F型（德标Schuko）。所有连接电源的无线设备须符合EN IEC 62368-1或过渡期内仍适用的EN 60950-1。CE DoC须引用适用的安全标准。
summary.zht: 科索沃已轉化歐盟低壓指令2014/35/EU（LVD）及RED第3(1)(a)條，要求無線電設備對健康和電氣安全方面是安全的。主要適用安全標準為EN IEC 62368-1（音視頻及資訊技術設備——安全要求）。科索沃主電源電壓為220-230V/50Hz；插頭類型為C型（歐洲雙腳）和F型（德標Schuko）。所有連接電源的無線設備須符合EN IEC 62368-1或過渡期內仍適用的EN 60950-1。CE DoC須引用適用的安全標準。

standards_or_laws: EU RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3(1)(a) (protection of health and safety)
EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 (audio/video and IT equipment — safety)
EN 60950-1:2006+A2:2013 (IT equipment safety — transitional, now superseded by 62368-1)
Kosovo mains: 220-230 V / 50 Hz / IEC 60083 Type C and Type F plugs

summary.en: China requires electrical safety certification under GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, based on IEC 60950-1) as part of CCC compulsory certification for applicable product categories. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-designated laboratories. China mains voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I plugs (GB 2099.1); plug compatibility differs from Kosovo Type C/F.
summary.zh: 中国对适用产品类别要求依据GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，基于IEC 60950-1）进行电气安全认证，作为CCC强制认证的组成部分。CCC测试由CNCA指定实验室进行。中国主电源电压为220V/50Hz，使用A/I型插头（GB 2099.1）；插头兼容性与科索沃C/F型不同。
summary.zht: 中國對適用產品類別要求依據GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，基於IEC 60950-1）進行電氣安全認證，作為CCC強制認證的組成部分。CCC測試由CNCA指定實驗室進行。中國主電源電壓為220V/50Hz，使用A/I型插頭（GB 2099.1）；插頭相容性與科索沃C/F型不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011/A1:2017 (IT equipment safety — based on IEC 60950-1)
GB 2099.1-2008 (plugs and socket-outlets — China Type A/I)
220 V / 50 Hz mains voltage (same frequency as Kosovo; plug type differs)

gap.en: EN IEC 62368-1 test reports from an EU/ILAC-accredited laboratory are required; GB 4943.1 test reports are not accepted as equivalents for Kosovo. CCC certification does not satisfy Kosovo LVD/RED safety requirements. Additionally, product power supplies and plugs must be designed for Type C/F (Schuko/Europlug) — Chinese Type A/I plugs are not compatible with Kosovo sockets. Adapters bundled with product may require separate safety compliance review.
gap.zh: 须提供来自欧盟/ILAC认可实验室的EN IEC 62368-1测试报告；GB 4943.1测试报告在科索沃不被视为等同替代。CCC认证不满足科索沃低压指令/RED安全要求。此外，产品电源和插头须设计为C/F型（德标/欧洲双脚）——中国A/I型插头与科索沃插座不兼容。随附产品的适配器可能需要单独进行安全合规审查。
gap.zht: 須提供來自歐盟/ILAC認可實驗室的EN IEC 62368-1測試報告；GB 4943.1測試報告在科索沃不被視為等同替代。CCC認證不滿足科索沃低壓指令/RED安全要求。此外，產品電源和插頭須設計為C/F型（德標/歐洲雙腳）——中國A/I型插頭與科索沃插座不相容。隨附產品的適配器可能需要單獨進行安全合規審查。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN IEC 62368-1 electrical safety testing and CE DoC referencing this standard are mandatory for Kosovo. GB 4943.1 and CCC do not satisfy Kosovo requirements. Plug and power supply configuration must match Kosovo Type C/F / 230 V / 50 Hz. Chinese product configurations shipped with Type A/I plugs require hardware modification or certified adapter inclusion.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EN IEC 62368-1电气安全测试及引用该标准的CE DoC为科索沃强制要求。GB 4943.1及CCC不满足科索沃要求。插头和电源配置须与科索沃C/F型/230V/50Hz相匹配。配备A/I型插头的中国产品配置须进行硬件改造或随附经认证的适配器。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EN IEC 62368-1電氣安全測試及引用該標準的CE DoC為科索沃強制要求。GB 4943.1及CCC不滿足科索沃要求。插頭和電源配置須與科索沃C/F型/230V/50Hz相匹配。配備A/I型插頭的中國產品配置須進行硬體改造或隨附經認證的適配器。
